creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 214728
patch to update the port

- update 20180117 -> 20200520
Changes: https://metacpan.org/changes/distribution/Mozilla-CA
- add LICENSE_FILE
- request maintainership as Jun Kuriyama is absent for 7+ years, see:
https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/head/www/p5-Mozilla-CA/Makefile?view=log

- "portlint -AC" gives non-relevant warns.
- Tested with:
12.1-RELEASE-p5 amd64
poudriere 3.3.4
perl 5.30.2
pkg 1.14.4
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
